summary: Complete frontend testing of BookMyVenue managed marketplace landing page redesign. All 16 test features passed successfully. The landing page now follows an Uber-style managed marketplace design with RM-centric flow, white background, and gold CTA buttons.

issues: Body background is rgb(249,249,247) - very light off-white instead of pure white (rgb(255,255,255)). This is minor and consistent with previous design - still provides white theme feel.

test_credentials: N/A - No auth required for landing page
context_for_next_testing_agent: Landing page redesigned to managed marketplace style (Uber-style for venue bookings). All sections verified: Hero with RM-centric messaging, 4-step operational flow, 5 advantage cards, 4 live activity blocks with green pulse, 8 city cards, For Venues partner section, footer with Platform/Company/Cities links.

hero_section_tests.headline: PASS - 'Structured Venue Booking. Managed End-to-End.' renders correctly
hero_section_tests.subheadline_rm_mention: PASS - 'Tell us your event requirements. Our dedicated RM coordinates availability, pricing, and booking across verified venues.'
hero_section_tests.secondary_cta: PASS - 'Talk to an RM' button present

city_coverage_tests.eight_cities: PASS - All 8 cities present: Delhi NCR, Mumbai, Bengaluru, Hyderabad, Pune, Jaipur, Goa, Udaipur

footer_tests.platform_links: PASS - Browse Venues, How It Works, For Venues present
footer_tests.company_links: PASS - Contact, Support, Privacy, Terms present
footer_tests.cities_links: PASS - Delhi NCR, Mumbai, Bengaluru, Hyderabad present

navigation_tests.search_submit: PASS - navigates to /venues with all query params

design_validation.gold_cta_buttons: PASS - #C7A14A (rgb(199,161,74)) correctly applied to CTA buttons
design_validation.dark_typography: PASS - Text colors are dark grey for good contrast
